text.title: Solo Content Calendar Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the ICP pain-ladder (top-5) documented AND a primary channel chosen?

branch.question: Is a weekly writing block committed AND Friday-gate accepted?

branch.conclusion: Seed 12-row calendar pinned to top-5 pains; enable Friday gate; schedule quarterly review.
Skip seeding; fix the writing block + accept the gate first.
Skip this methodology. Lock ICP top-5 + pick one channel before seeding the calendar.

text.example: icp_top5=[P1,P2,P3,P4,P5] channel=seo gate=true block=Wed 10:00 → seed 12 rows per r1-pain-pinned.
